agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines Article 4 directions for the Norland Neighbourhood Area. I identified page 13 as the primary map (area_group 0). A search for 'Norland Square' provided a candidate at (51.5069, -0.2100). The match_at call on page 13 yielded a very strong result with 1180 inliers and 90% road name agreement (18/20 roads matched). The scale consistency was acceptable at 0.73. I committed this match for the single area group.
